examples: With characteristic astuteness, he spoke separately to all those involved.
Young Singaporeans seem to lack the astuteness and dynamism that they possess.
Every time we got together, she would declare her astuteness and would never take my advice because it was always wrong.
Mr Menem, whose political astuteness is unquestioned, would now appear to have two options.
